LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ERIKA MCCARTNEY'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF STIPULATED CONSENT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH THE REQUIREMENTS OF PROPOSITION 65. WRITTEN ORDER AND CONSENT JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; NOT REPORTED. (D302)

MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)
